name: BetterInfo+
description: BetterInfo with extra level sorting, visibility filters and page tools

auto-submit.name: Auto submit to leaderboards
auto-submit.description: Automatically submits your level score to the level leaderboards upon exiting a level

level-info.name: Enable Extended Level Info
level-info.description: Whether the custom level info dialog from BI should be used

fix-green-users.name: Fix broken usernames
fix-green-users.description: Whether destroyed green usernames no longer returned by the servers should be fixed using data from the GDHistory project

white-id.name: White Level ID text
white-id.description: Displays level IDs in level search white instead of grey. Useful if you have transparent lists

show-comment-ids.name: Show comment IDs
show-comment-ids.description: Whether comment IDs should be shown in comment cells

show-level-ids.name: Show level IDs
show-level-ids.description: Whether level IDs should be shown in level cells

exact-comment-date.name: Show Exact Comment Dates (read info)
exact-comment-date.description:
## Highly experimental feature
Shows full comment dates in YYYY-MM-DD using the GDHistory Date Estimator (online). Not fully accurate yet.
The comment date database is not complete yet, so estimates from the equivalent of today's date x years ago to September 1st of the same year will be highly inaccurate. This means that as of the time of addition of this feature all dates between xxxx-02-25 and xxxx-09-01 cannot be trusted yet.

reset-saved-filters.name: Reset saved level filters on Restart
reset-saved-filters.description: Whether saved level filters should be reset when the game is restarted

bip-visibility-filter.name: Visibility filter button
bip-visibility-filter.description: Adds a button to level browsers that cycles between showing <cy>all</c>, <cg>public only</c>, <cy>unlisted</c>, <cy>unlisted only</c> and <cl>friends only</c> levels on the current page. Most useful in <cy>My Online Levels</c> and on friends' profiles (public tabs like Recent never contain unlisted levels server-side)

bip-page-sort.name: Page sort button
bip-page-sort.description: Adds a button to level browsers that sorts the levels of the <cy>current page</c> by downloads, likes (ascending or descending) or by level ID (newest / oldest)

bip-completed-filter.name: Completed filter button
bip-completed-filter.description: Adds a button to level browsers that can <cy>hide completed levels</c> or show <cy>only completed levels</c> on the current page. Handy in the Recent / Most Downloaded / Most Liked tabs

bip-copy-ids.name: Copy page IDs button
bip-copy-ids.description: Adds a button to level browsers that copies the level IDs of the currently displayed page to the clipboard (comma separated)

bip-visibility-badges.name: Visibility badges on level cells
bip-visibility-badges.description: Shows a small <cy>UNLISTED</c> / <cl>FRIENDS ONLY</c> label on level cells for non-public levels

bip-global-sort.name: Sort in BetterInfo search results
bip-global-sort.description: Adds a <cy>Sort</c> button to the BetterInfo filtered search results view (opened via the + button in level browsers). Unlike the page sort, this sorts <cg>all fetched results at once</c>, which is the best way to sort all your online levels by downloads or likes
